title: After the Japanese Derby: Standing Tall

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the spring Classics. Intense training is
off the table for now, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby. Unable to resist this
once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, we shoot for the
stars. And the result?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe dominates at the Japanese
Derby! She stands tall atop the indestructible
skyscraper!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But will her body hold out? She looks exhausted
and her footing is unstable, but... despite it all,
she lives up to everyone's expectations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's so worn out that I feel myself aching just
looking at her. And yet, Manhattan Cafe has
made it happen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My, oh my. And after I told you there was no
point pushing ourselves. I've never been ignored
so thoroughly. You'd think I was completely
invisible.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'll need you to go as hard with your
treatment as she went on herself. We'll be
administering supplements 3a, 8b, and 6d_2 in
that order.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You'll be needing three days' rest. But given that
we've eased up on your training, I'm sure you'll be
fine.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's a little late for apologies, don't you
think?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But since you ran anyway, hold your head up
high. I assume you've gotten what you wanted out
of all this, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We provide Manhattan Cafe with the best
possible aftercare we can, and it looks like we'll
be able to head into the autumn season with high
hopes.
